Intern Request Form Template

Author(s): Jennifer Waxman, Alyssa Lampert, Grace Ewles

1 Download

Get Instant Access
To unlock the full content, please fill out our simple form and receive instant access.

Unlock Tool/Template

Get Instant Access


Unlock Sample Research
Share on Social

Select Social Platform:

Share on X Share on LinkedIn

Use the Intern Request Form Template to receive details of internship needs, including:

  • Number of interns
  • Overview of intern work
  • Available budget for intern compensation
  • Intern audience
  • Internship duration and timeframe
  • Intern rationale

Use this template to understand what internal stakeholders are looking for with their intern hiring requests.

Tags

Please confirm the appointment time and click Schedule.

### DATE START ###

New

Info-Tech, McLean & Company, and SoftwareReviews are introducing single sign-on.

  • Use your current credentials to sign in on the next page.
  • If you have one membership, nothing will change for you - just sign in as usual.
  • If you have more than one membership, the account email and password you use the first time will be applied to every membership.

Sites included

  • Info-Tech Research Group
  • McLean & Company
  • McLean 360 Feedback
  • McLean Connect
  • McLean EXM
  • SoftwareReviews Vendor Portal
